# pageCacheSize()

**Instance Method**

Returns the maximum number of pages that the receiver can cache.

## Declaration

```swift
func pageCacheSize() -> Int
```

## Return Value

The maximum number of pages that can be cached.

## Page Caching

- **setPageCacheSize(_:)**: Sets the maximum number of pages the receiver can cache.
